replicaCount.description: Number of operator replicas. Default 2 — leader election keeps one active and one hot standby so node drains and chart upgrades don't gap reconciles. Set to 1 only when scheduling pressure forces it; pair with podDisruptionBudget.enabled=false.

teleport.description: Teleport binding for this consumer MC (ADR 0005). The operator fails fast at startup if either field is empty; the templates/deployment.yaml `required` helm function gates `helm install` with a clearer error than a JSON Schema violation. Schema-level `required:` on the two fields is intentionally absent so `ct lint` accepts the default values.yaml empty block — pattern + minLength still gate any supplied value, and the operator's startup regex check is the authoritative contract.

clusterName.description: Teleport cluster name (the `Cluster:` line from `tctl status` on Central). Used as the `aud` claim on every rendered tbot pod's projected SA JWT.

proxyAddr.description: host:port of the Teleport proxy every rendered tbot pod connects to.

image.description: tbot image reference, composed as `<registry>/<name>:<tag>` with an optional `@<digest>`. Sourced from gsoci by default so rendered pods satisfy the restrict-image-registries Kyverno policy; override `registry` to pull from a different mirror. The major version MUST match the Teleport server major — the `GenerateUserCerts` RPC contract changes across majors and a mismatched-major tbot fails first cert renewal with `ssh: no key found` (initial join still works for ~1h, so this is easy to miss in short smoke tests). SHOULD stay digest-pinned in production so a re-push of an upstream tag cannot silently change tbot's config schema underneath the operator.

digest.description: Optional content digest (`sha256:<hex>`) appended as `@<digest>` to pin the image by content. Leave empty for tag-only refs in dev/smoke workflows.

tls.description: Ghostunnel TLS-termination sidecar (ADR 0007 / slice 02). Every rendered tbot Deployment grows a ghostunnel sidecar that reads the SVID and serves it on the Service's `tls` port.

image.description: ghostunnel sidecar image reference, composed as `<registry>/<name>:<tag>` with an optional `@<digest>`. Sourced from gsoci by default so the rendered sidecar satisfies the restrict-image-registries Kyverno policy; override `registry` to pull from a different mirror.

digest.description: Optional content digest (`sha256:<hex>`) appended as `@<digest>` to pin the image by content.

reloadInterval.description: Go-duration value for ghostunnel's --timed-reload flag. 5m is safe with tbot's default 20m SVID renewal cadence.

port.description: TLS port the rendered Service exposes and the ghostunnel sidecar listens on inside the pod.

monitoring.description: PrometheusRule with alerts for the tunnelport data plane (tunnel-pod CrashLoopBackOff, operator with no available replicas). Rendered into installNamespace; the expressions select tunnel pods cluster-wide.

trustBundle.description: Singleton trust-bundle tbot (ADR 0008). One chart-managed tbot Deployment writes the SPIFFE trust bundle into a single Secret in installNamespace; consumers co-deployed in this namespace mount that Secret.

tokenName.description: Teleport-central ProvisionToken name admitting the singleton bot via kubernetes-join. Empty disables a meaningful install — the chart's template uses helm `required` to fail install when trustBundle.enabled and tokenName is empty.

workloadIdentityLabels.description: Selector labels matching the Teleport-central WorkloadIdentity resource. Default key is `trust-bundle` (distinct from per-CR `remoteapp:` selectors).
